title: Bryobium puguahaanense
taxonomy: Bryobium puguahaanense is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It is classified under the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it is placed within the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Cranichideae. Further categorization places it within the genus Bryobium, which is a small group of epiphytic orchids. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
